base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of thief_ninja — a character from 1987 final fantasy. Thief + Ninja class-change — green hood, dagger/sword. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Thief + Ninja class-change — green hood, dagger/sword
